prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第30名持续上升至2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，体                         现学校综合实力增强；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅和专业设置问题导致投档线暴跌约500名，但2025年位次已基本企稳；抖音热度总排名                         第13（高热），综合热度约387万，短视频平台关注度较高，反映报考热度不低；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程获A+，                         植物保护、生物学获A，共7个A-及以上学科（含5个A+），学科实力位居全国农林类高校前列，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信                        、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，中国农业大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、机械类等热门方向，有助于维持报考热度；河北省物理类考生数从2021年21.6万增至                        2025年36.3万，增幅约68%，2026年总考生约60.98万，按近年物理类占比约60%估算约36.6万人，竞争持续加剧；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分升至2025年459分，整                         体分数线上移；中国农业大学位于北京，属一线城市高校，对河北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省物理类招生人数占比较大（约140–150人），属于该校                         在省外的主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年扩招约7.1%（缓解竞争）、学校排名持续上升（第24名）及985层次吸引力、河北省物理类考生持                         续增加（竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应大致抵消，学校排名上升对报考有正向拉动。在2025年基准20009名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约20867名，区间2036                        7–21367名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19006 → 17536 → 21159 → 19893 → 20009. In recent three years, fluctuations have been significant, with an abnormal drop in 2023 (21159th), a recovery to 19893rd in 2024, and basically stable at 20009th in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 20009th. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 137, 140, 140, 140, 140 respectively, stable at 140 for four consecutive years. In 2026, the plan increases to 150, an expansion of about 7.1% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was significantly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and major setting issues, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission score line. However, by 2025, the ranking has basically stabilized. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 13th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 3.87 million, indicating considerable attention on short video platforms and reflecting high application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering received A+, Plant Protection and Biology received A, totaling 7 disciplines at A- or above (including 5 A+), placing its disciplinary strength among the top agricultural and forestry universities nationwide, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended. China Agricultural University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Mechanical Engineering, helping maintain application enthusiasm. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province increased from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025, an increase of about 68%. In 2026, total examinees are about 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 366,000 based on the recent proportion of about 60%, indicating continuously intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, with an overall upward trend. Located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, it has strong regional appeal to Hebei examinees. The university enrolls a relatively large number of students from Hebei Province (about 140–150), making it one of its main out-of-province source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical ranking fluctuation trends, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.1% (easing competition), the university's continuously rising ranking (24th) and 985-level appeal, and the continuous increase in Hebei Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the expansion effect and the examinee increase effect roughly offset each other, while the rising ranking positively drives applications. Based on the 2025 baseline of 20009th, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 20867th, with a range of 20367–21367th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 20867th, range 20367–21367th. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy, etc., which are advantageous disciplines). Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information) can be attempted but are highly competitive. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 20000th), focus on attacking Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper bound (above 21300th), it is recommended to secure Tier 3 majors as a backup, prioritizing majors related to Yantai Research Institute.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2212 → 2028 → 2251 → 2531 → 2528. There was a slight improvement from 2021 to 2022, but a continuous decline since 2023, with a cumulative drop of about 300 places in the last three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2528. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 20, 21, 22, 22, and 42 students respectively, with a significant expansion to 42 in 2025 (including new programs at Yantai Research Institute). The 2026 plan is 37 students, a reduction of about 11.9% compared to 2025, indicating a substantial contraction and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, showing continuous improvement. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative (with a sharp drop of about 500 places in admission scores), but the 2025 ranking of 2528 is essentially flat compared to 2024's 2531, indicating stabilization. It ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high attention. It has A+ disciplines in Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grass Science, and Food Science and Engineering, an A in Plant Protection, and a B in Biology, totaling 7 A- or above disciplines, making its agricultural and forestry disciplines top-tier nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are relatively popular. China Agricultural University's History Category enrollment includes popular directions like Law, Communication, Business Administration, and Economics, which have some appeal. The number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province increased from 202,000 in 2021 to 244,000 in 2025, an increase of about 21%, with an estimated 244,000 in 2026, indicating continuously intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, showing an upward trend. Beijing universities have strong regional appeal for Hebei examinees. In 2025, the History Category plan expanded significantly to 42 students (including Yantai Research Institute programs), but in 2026 it will shrink to 37, though still higher than the 2024 and earlier levels.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of declining rankings, the approximately 11.9% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensifying competition), the continuous increase in History Category examinees in Hebei Province, and the rising university ranking, the dual pressure of enrollment reduction and increased examinees outweighs the effect of improved university appeal. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2528, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2297, with a range of 1952 to 2642.
